title: Dunlap XC
description: A spring cross-country from Dunlap in the Sierra foothills — working thermals over the Kings River country and Pine Flat Lake on a hazy San Joaquin afternoon.

media.caption: Climbing out over the Sierra foothills
High over the hazy San Joaquin edge
Cirrus streets along the Sierra front
Sun glinting off Pine Flat Lake
Selfie over the Kings River country
Late-day glide above Pine Flat Lake
